verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Flowers blooming in the spring, Only show the beauty of the season They fade away, to bloom again someday The morning sun arises on the rhine, Just to hide behind a lonely horizon But comes morning, it will be rising

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And the trees that seems to die in deepest winter And the grass as of the field, they fade away But the light thatl let them come back in spring time And again they rise to live another day.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All nature testify that He has risen, Resurrection power He has given To those who will believe on Him He promised they would rise And because He's faithful and true… I can say that,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know my Redeemer liveth And because He lives, I know that I will rise again And those in Christ are waiting, shall rise To the sky and meet Him in the air. He is the resurrection and holds the keys to the dark and gloomy grave And He alone has proven, that He is the One and only Lord And because He is, I can live forever more.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He lives and reigns forever, And by His side I know that I will stand And then it comes when the day is done, will glorify the Lord He is the resurrection and Holds the keys to the dark and gloomy grave And He alone has proven, that He is the one and only Lord And because He is I can live forever more.
